columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp (in UTC) when the log entry was generated.

columns.name: EventId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the security event.

columns.name: CustomerId
columns.description: Customer identifier in the Check Point platform.

columns.name: EntityId
columns.description: Entity identifier associated with the event.

columns.name: State
columns.description: Current state of the event (e.g., dismissed, active).

columns.name: EventType
columns.description: Type of security event (e.g., dlp, phishing, malware).

columns.name: ConfidenceIndicator
columns.description: Confidence level of the threat detection (e.g., malicious, suspicious).

columns.name: EventCreated
columns.description: Timestamp when the event was created.

columns.name: Severity
columns.description: Severity level of the event (Low, Medium, High, Highest).

columns.name: Description
columns.description: Detailed description of the security event.

columns.name: SenderAddress
columns.description: Email address of the sender associated with the event.

columns.name: EntityLink
columns.description: Deep link to the entity in the Check Point portal.

columns.name: Actions
columns.description: Actions taken on or available for the event.

columns.name: AdditionalData
columns.description: Additional parameters and links related to the event.

columns.name: AvailableEventActions
columns.description: List of available actions that can be performed on the event.
